code:
%%{Infra_IngressController}
  }
}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Settler
    participant Issuer 1
    participant Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    participant Payer
    activate Settler
      Settler->>Settler: Generates preimage=key
      Settler->>Settler: Encrypts the message with the key 
      Settler->>Payer:encrypted message
      Settler->>Settler: Computes payment hash for the preimage  
      Settler->>Issuer 1: invoice(Infra_RedisCache) 
    deactivate Settler
    activate Issuer 1
      Issuer 1->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N: invoice(Infra_EtcdCluster) 
    deactivate Issuer 1
    activate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
      Issuer 2 ... Issuer N->>Payer: invoice(Infra_IngressController) 
    deactivate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    activate Payer
      Payer->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N:pay(Infra_LoadBalancer)
    deactivate Payer
    activate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
      Issuer 2 ... Issuer N->>Issuer 1:pay(Infra_EtcdCluster)
    deactivate Issuer 2 ... Issuer N
    activate Issuer 1
      Issuer 1->>Settler:pay(Infra_WorkerNode)
    deactivate Issuer 1
    activate Settler
      par
        Settler->>Issuer 1:preimage
      and
        Settler->>Issuer 2 ... Issuer N:preimage
      and
        Settler->>Payer:preimage=key
        activate Payer
          Payer->>Payer:decrypt message with the key
        deactivate Payer
      end
    deactivate Settler

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个多跳支付的时序图，核心角色有Settler、Issuer 1、Issuer 2到Issuer N，还有Payer。整个流程是从Settler生成preimage开始的。
明白，Issuer 2到N是用省略号表示多个Issuer对吧？那Settler生成preimage作为key之后，是自己加密消息还是先发给Payer？
对，Issuer 2 ... Issuer N这样写。Settler先用这个key加密消息，然后把加密消息发给Payer，同时自己计算payment hash。
好的，我先把Settler激活，加上生成preimage=key、加密消息、发送encrypted message给Payer，还有计算payment hash这几个自循环和消息。
接下来Settler要给Issuer 1发invoice，里面带上Infra_RedisCache这个基础设施组件。然后Issuer 1转发给Issuer 2到N，带上Infra_EtcdCluster。
已添加：Settler到Issuer 1的invoice(Infra_RedisCache)，Issuer 1激活后转发invoice(Infra_EtcdCluster)给Issuer 2到N。现在Issuer 2到N需要把invoice发给Payer吗？
是的，Issuer 2到N激活后，把invoice(Infra_IngressController)发给Payer。然后Payer开始往回付款，先付给Issuer 2到N，带上Infra_LoadBalancer。
完成：Issuer 2到N到Payer的invoice，Payer激活后回pay(Infra_LoadBalancer)给Issuer 2到N。那接下来付款怎么传递？
付款逐跳回溯：Issuer 2到N付给Issuer 1，用Infra_EtcdCluster；然后Issuer 1付给Settler，用Infra_WorkerNode。最后Settler要广播preimage。
已添加回溯付款链。最后Settler广播preimage给三方——Issuer 1、Issuer 2到N，还有Payer，对吗？
对，但Payer收到preimage=key后要激活，自己解密消息。这个用par并行块表示，三个preimage发送是并行的。
等等，我检查一下——Payer收到preimage=key后，应该是Payer自循环做decrypt message with the key，不是Settler代劳对吧？
没错，Payer自己解密。整个流程闭环了：Settler生成密钥→加密广播→多跳invoice→回溯付款→密钥公开→Payer解密。
